operationName: Operation Swords of Iron (Israel) / October 7 War
heroHeadline: First Direct US-Hamas Talks Yield No Breakthrough; Daily Strikes Kill 5+ on Apr 20; Toll Reaches 775 Since October Ceasefire
heroSubtitle: Aid at only 37% of required levels as OCHA warns famine conditions persist; 72,551+ killed since Oct 7, 2023; US-Hamas direct talks in Cairo fail to end deadlock on Phase 2
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Hamas, UN OCHA, UNRWA, WHO, ICJ, ICC, Times of Israel, and Haaretz. Gaza death toll: 72,551+ confirmed killed since Oct 7, 2023 (Gaza Ministry of Health, Apr 20 2026). 775 killed since Oct 10, 2025 ceasefire framework (Gaza MoH Apr 20, 2026). 2,400+ ceasefire violations documented by Gaza GMO. ICC arrest warrants issued for Netanyahu and Gallant (Nov 2024). Board of Peace established Jan 2026 under UN Resolution 2803; first direct US-Hamas talks in Cairo (Apr 14-15, 2026) yielded no breakthrough; Hamas rejecting disarmament (Apr 2026). Kosovo approved troop contribution to Gaza Stabilization Force (Apr 17). ICJ Advisory Opinion (Oct 22, 2025): Israel must allow UNRWA to operate — Israel refuses to comply. OCHA Apr 17 report: aid at 37% of required levels; ~102–122 trucks/day vs. 600+ needed; Zikim Crossing reopened Apr 12 on alternating days. Lancet Mortality Survey: 75,200 violent deaths through Jan 5, 2025. UNRWA SitRep #217 (Apr 8–14): 571,000 in emergency hunger, 18,000 await medical evacuation. 2026 Flash Appeal $4.1B req, only 9.7% funded. OHCHR (Apr 10): 589 aid workers and 294 Palestinian journalists killed since Oct 7, 2023.
